Hero.description: The ultimate clipboard manager with unparalleled performance. Outperforms PasteNow and Paste by a significant margin. Switch between landscape and portrait modes effortlessly. The clear choice for Mac power users.

Pricing.title: Pricing
Pricing.description: No subscriptions. Compare to Paste's $29.99/year. Clipaste: one payment, yours forever.
